title: 乡村振兴
subtitle: Rural Revitalization, Village Development, Agricultural Renewal
assistant_message: Learn to discuss rural revitalization, village development strategies, and agricultural renewal.

examples.chinese: 通过发展特色产业来振兴乡村经济。
examples.translation: Revitalize the rural economy through developing specialty industries.
examples.translation_id: Revitalisasi ekonomi pedesaan melalui pengembangan industri spesialisasi.

examples.chinese: 乡村振兴不仅需要资金投入，而且需要人才支持。
examples.translation: Rural revitalization requires not only capital investment but also talent support.
examples.translation_id: Revitalisasi pedesaan tidak hanya membutuhkan investasi modal tetapi juga dukungan bakat.

examples.chinese: 乡村振兴的关键在于产业兴旺和生态宜居。
examples.translation: The key to rural revitalization lies in thriving industries and livable ecology.
examples.translation_id: Kunci revitalisasi pedesaan terletak pada industri yang berkembang dan ekologi yang layak huni.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: He Jing
dialogue.chinese: 通过发展特色产业来振兴乡村经济，这条路可行吗？
dialogue.pinyin: Tōngguò fāzhǎn tèsè chǎnyè lái zhènxīng xiāngcūn jīngjì, zhè tiáo lù kěxíng ma?
dialogue.translation: Revitalizing the rural economy through developing specialty industries - is this path feasible?
dialogue.translation_id: Revitalisasi ekonomi pedesaan melalui pengembangan industri spesialisasi - apakah jalan ini layak?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Sun Ping
dialogue.chinese: 乡村振兴不仅需要资金投入，而且需要人才支持。年轻人返乡创业很重要。
dialogue.pinyin: Xiāngcūn zhènxīng bùjǐn xūyào zījīn tóurù, érqiě xūyào réncái zhīchí. Niánqīng rén fǎnxiāng chuàngyè hěn zhòngyào.
dialogue.translation: Rural revitalization requires not only capital investment but also talent support. It's important for young people to return to their hometowns to start businesses.
dialogue.translation_id: Revitalisasi pedesaan tidak hanya membutuhkan investasi modal tetapi juga dukungan bakat. Penting bagi generasi muda untuk kembali ke kampung halaman untuk memulai bisnis.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: He Jing
dialogue.chinese: 如何吸引年轻人回到乡村？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé xīyǐn niánqīng rén huí dào xiāngcūn?
dialogue.translation: How to attract young people back to rural areas?
dialogue.translation_id: Bagaimana menarik generasi muda kembali ke pedesaan?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Sun Ping
dialogue.chinese: 乡村振兴的关键在于产业兴旺和生态宜居。改善基础设施，发展生态农业，让乡村既有发展机会又有生活质量。
dialogue.pinyin: Xiāngcūn zhènxīng de guānjiàn zàiyú chǎnyè xīngwàng hé shēngtài yíjū. Gǎishàn jīchǔ shèshī, fāzhǎn shēngtài nóngyè, ràng xiāngcūn jì yǒu fāzhǎn jīhuì yòu yǒu shēnghuó zhìliàng.
dialogue.translation: The key to rural revitalization lies in thriving industries and livable ecology. Improve infrastructure, develop ecological agriculture, so that rural areas have both development opportunities and quality of life.
dialogue.translation_id: Kunci revitalisasi pedesaan terletak pada industri yang berkembang dan ekologi yang layak huni. Tingkatkan infrastruktur, kembangkan pertanian ekologis, sehingga pedesaan memiliki peluang pembangunan dan kualitas hidup.

exercises.question: How to say 'rural revitalization' in Chinese?
Complete: 乡村振兴不仅需要资金投入，______需要人才支持。
